issues.description: Second effect with trigger 'Trigger' and KO action has no basis in card text. Official text only describes a single Main effect: Rest up to 1 opponent Character with cost ≤4. This KO effect with cost ≤3 is completely fabricated.
Rest action should target 'up to 1' Character, but 'maxCost' alone does not express the 'up to 1' quantity limit. Target scope needs explicit count constraint.

suggestedDsl.effectText: [Main] Rest up to 1 of your opponent's Characters with a cost of 4 or less.
